allow: PowerShell(Push-Location 'C:\\Users\\serka\\soma\\app'; try { $out = & 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npx.cmd' tsc --noEmit 2>&1; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE"; "lines=$\($out.Count\)"; $out | Select-Object -First 50 } finally { Pop-Location })

PowerShell($test = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 8081 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "port_8081_open=$test"; Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count | ForEach-Object { "node_processes=$_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://dist-sage-ten-11.vercel.app' -Method Get -TimeoutSec 15 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(800, $r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Output "STATUS $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd\(\).Substring\(0, 800\) } })
